title: The Uncraftables
description: Makes uncraftable items craftable, to a reasonable extent.
body:
Adds recipes to things that you have always wanted to craft. In the latest version, here are all the recipes.
1. Saddle
2. Name Tag
3. Bell
4. Chainmail Helmet
5. Chainmail Chestplate
6. Chainmail Leggings
7. Chainmail Boots
8. Iron Horse Armor
9. Gold Horse Armor
10. Diamond Horse Armor
11. Brown Mushroom Block
12. Red Mushroom Block
13. Trident
14. Podzol
15. Grass Block
16. Double Tall Grass
17. Amethyst Shard
18. Amethyst Block

Recipe video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AUm3-P-AtFQ
